response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff-level engineer with a strong background in TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud infrastructure, along with demonstrated technical leadership. However, the role strictly requires 8+ years of experience specifically building AI-driven solutions, whereas Bogdan's resume only indicates very recent exposure to AI agents and MCP in their latest role. Without the deep, long-term expertise in Python, RAG architectures, and vector databases, they fall short of the core GenAI requirements.
strengths: Extensive software engineering experience (15+ years) with proven technical leadership and a recent Staff-level title.
Strong proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud infrastructure tools like AWS CDK and Kubernetes.
Recent relevant exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, agentic workflows, and Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers.
concerns: Falls significantly short of the required 8+ years of experience specifically building production-grade AI solutions.
Lacks demonstrated experience with Python, vector databases, and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architectures.
No evidence of building AI evaluation pipelines, observability frameworks, or working with LLM performance metrics.
